asset_case: EN-asset-is-English (en.json holds English; title field still JP -> JP->VI Title Case)
source_authority:
EN asset (delimiters, BOM, CRLF,
counts, cards); ja.json == identity map

character_voice.アヤメ (Ayame): female subordinate, secretary/assassin; self 'em'; addresses Commander 'Chỉ Huy' (title) and respectful 'Ngài' where EN 'Lord Commander'
character_voice.倉庫警備の兵士 (guard soldier): male subordinate; self 'tôi'; addresses Commander 'Chỉ Huy'
character_voice.モンスター / モンスターたち: monster SFX localized: groooaaar/GROOOAAARRR -> Gừư!/Gừưư!; gyaaaaaa -> Giáaaa...

terminology.Lord Commander: Chỉ Huy (with 'Ngài' for respectful second person)

intentional_localization: Monster growls groooaaar/GROOOAAARRR/gyaaaaaa localized to Vietnamese onomatopoeia (Gừư!/Gừưư!/Giáaaa...) to clear UNCHANGED_TEXT_RECORDS.
bang! -> Bùm!/Bùm! Bùm! Bùm!/*bùm!*; Wha -> Á; *phew* -> *thở phào*; Ahem -> Khụ khụ.
notes: EN-asset carries a comma typo 'Commaander'? No — this asset uses correct 'Commander'; translated to 'Chỉ Huy' per rules.
No ASCII commas inside VI text fields (all use U+201A '‚').
All trailing parts[3:] (voice/chara keys) preserved byte-identical.
